questions.q: Who was the first Abbasid caliph and what was his full name?
Describe the process of the rise of Sufism in the Abbasid period.
questions.answer: Sufism rose as a reaction to the corruption and materialism of the Abbasid society.

questions.q: Who was the founder of the Fatimid dynasty?
What was the significance of the 'Abbasid Revolution'?
questions.answer: The 'Abbasid Revolution' marked the end of Umayyad rule and the beginning of Abbasid rule.

questions.q: What were the main sources of the Abbasid economy?
questions.answer: Trade, agriculture, and industry were the main sources of the Abbasid economy.

questions.q: Describe the significance of the 'Golden Age' of the Abbasid period.
questions.answer: The 'Golden Age' of the Abbasid period saw significant advancements in science, art, and culture.

questions.q: Who was the famous Abbasid caliph known for his military campaigns?
What was the primary reason for the decline of the Abbasid Caliphate?
questions.answer: The primary reason for the decline of the Abbasid Caliphate was the internal power struggle and the rise of local dynasties.

questions.q: Describe the role of the Abbasid bureaucracy in the administration of the empire.
questions.answer: The Abbasid bureaucracy played a crucial role in the administration of the empire through the use of a well-organized administrative system.

questions.q: Who was the founder of the Buyid dynasty?
